title: Capability Token Claims
description: Claims payload for a capability token per V1.1 §4.2.1, ADR-0003 (PROPOSED), and SECURITY.md §8. additionalProperties=false: only defined claims are allowed; extensions MUST go in namespaced extensions container. No ambiguous permission fields.

aud.description: Audience; MUST be in audience registry (§5)

scope.description: Minimum-privilege scope entries; MUST match scope registry (§5). A5 scope MUST NOT be granted.

max_authorization_tier.description: Maximum authorization tier; A5 MUST NOT be granted (V1.1 §4.2). MUST be consistent with scope.

policy_bundle_hash.description: Hash of the policy bundle that authorized this token

nonce.description: Challenge nonce for request binding (optional but recommended)

description: Capability token claims define the minimum-privilege authorization token (V1.1 §4.2.1, third layer). No top-level ambiguous permission fields allowed. Extensions MUST go in namespaced extensions container. alg=none is FORBIDDEN (enforced in capability-token.schema.json).
